reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality - sent math question and verified correct response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully, app displayed with sidebar containing agents
Found "QA-20260616-183948-715a" agent in sidebar - Agent found in "Your Agents" list with "idle" status indicator
Clicked on agent to open it - Agent page loaded, displaying agent details and message input interface
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status indicator shows "idle" (acceptable state)
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully typed into input field and sent via Send button
Waited for agent response - Agent processed for 16 seconds, activity indicator showed "Working..." then disappeared
Verified response mentions "4" - Agent response clearly displays "4" with timestamp "Worked for 16s" below it
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with user message and agent response displaying "4"
